entries.content: For read-only target_path tools, wrap the reader body in `withOptionalTargetPathStore`, use the active target store for all storage reads and product filtering, and append `_projectContext` only when target context exists. Do not add target confirmation fields for snapshot-only reads.

For target_path snapshot readers with changeId filters, avoid live Temporal workflow lookup against the target project unless the target store is known live/current. Snapshot reads should stay on disk/store fallback so untrusted target reads remain read-only and service-independent.
